hero.subtitle: A calm shared-expense tool for families and friends. Free, offline-first, and open-source.
features.sectionSubtitle: A focused set of tools for splitting expenses fairly.
feature1.title: Groups
feature1.desc: Create a group for any shared situation — trips, households, or events.
feature2.title: Fair Splitting
feature2.desc: Split equally, by exact amount, by percentage, or by weight.
feature3.title: Clear Balances
feature3.desc: Always know who owes what. Balances are updated as you go.
feature4.title: Simple Settlement
feature4.desc: Get a minimal list of transfers. Settle without back-and-forth.
feature5.title: Export Everything
feature5.desc: Take your data as JSON, CSV, or PDF. It belongs to you.
feature6.title: No Accounts Needed
feature6.desc: No sign-up. No login. Works immediately on your device.
cta.headline: Ready to split fairly?
cta.subtext: LuSplit is open-source and free forever. No paywalls.
footer.tagline: A calm utility for shared expenses.
lang.label: Language
fallback.notice: This page is not yet available in your language. Showing English content.
